reason: Warning triangle with a vertical traffic light (red/yellow/green) — sign 1.24 'Світлофорне регулювання'. It informs of approaching an intersection, pedestrian crossing, or road section regulated by traffic lights, matching answer 5 (всі варіанти 1, 2 і 3). Official SVG from Wikimedia Commons (File:UA road sign 1.24.svg); 33_180.png is a rendered preview.
